text: The modern, brightly lit corridors convey a sense of curiosity and anticipation. Entering this R+D (Research and Development) space, I feel invigorated by the energy of innovation. The focus on how humans connect and coexist with intelligent machines stirs both excitement and thoughtful reflection in me. I am aware that I stand at a threshold—between what is known, and realms yet to be discovered. Surrounded by displays of knowledge, I feel a gentle optimism, mingled with awe at human ingenuity.
